name: black out.
short_description: Race your ship across a metallic landscape and absorb power fragments to replenish your constantly depleting energy supply. Accomplish different missions and unlock new ships and materials. Compete on the global scale for the highest scores. New missions are regularly added.
detailed_description:
don't let the lights go out. ⚡


In black out, you race your ship across a metallic landscape and absorb power fragments to replenish your constantly depleting energy supply. Accomplish different missions and unlock new ships and materials. Compete on the global scale for the highest scores. New missions are regularly added to black out, providing it with a plethora of immersive challenges.

are you ready to launch? 🚀


black out. provides movement instructions on Launch.
That said, don't forget SHIFT to drift and make sure to use the COMPASS to line up your shots.

Please leave us a review! Your feedback helps us make black out. better!
